benefits.description: Dropped from 245 to 225 lbs in approximately one month, then stalled weeks 5-7, recovered after carb loading and lost additional 5 lbs the following week

side_effects.description: Felt like shit during weeks 5-7; glycogen depletion from insufficient carb intake

protocol_notes: Weight stalled weeks 5-7 due to glycogen depletion from low carb intake. Carb loaded for 3-4 days, scale went up 2 lbs, felt better, then the extra 2 lbs were gone the following week plus an additional 5 lbs lost. Emphasizes electrolytes, sodium, and listening to your body.
